title: Plant Fiber
description: Looking for a mod that adds plant fiber to 1.16.5? well, look no more! This mod adds plant fiber to 1.16.5 forge.
body:
Adds Plant fiber, Plant string and a Flower Crown to the game!

The flower crown gives **resistance 1**.



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Plant Fiber recipe (any sapling can be used)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bf734f76b24a5d799ac63161c5c51899512b1d5.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Plant string recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55afdb22d9a61f23bad44329a61cb9e52c0dbcb2.webp)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Plant string to string recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b781fd3c365436b66e9a6fb8cd0d256f2af14938.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Flower crown recipe (any flower can be used)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03c7f36e25d163f85eb7cf1949faf5f1287ab470.webp)

</details>

Anyone is free to use this mod in a modpack if they want. But please dont distribute it as your own.
